g.data-narration: Welcome to Special-Purpose Systems. We explore OS types optimized for specific applications beyond general computing.
Special-purpose systems are OS optimized for specific tasks, prioritizing efficiency, reliability, and predictability over general flexibility.
g.text: requirements not met by general-purpose OS.

g.data-narration: Unlike general-purpose OS designed for flexibility, special-purpose systems target specific domains like real-time control or embedded devices.
Real-Time Operating Systems prioritize predictable response times over raw speed, crucial for time-critical applications.
g.text: Processes data as it arrives with

g.data-narration: Hard real-time systems cannot miss deadlines (airbags, pacemakers), while soft real-time can tolerate偶尔 misses (video streaming).
RTOS features preemptive priority scheduling, small footprint, and determinism ensuring predictable operation timing.
g.text: Highest priority task always gets the CPU • Known timing for all operations

g.data-narration: Embedded systems operate on specialized devices with limited resources, performing dedicated functions within larger products.
Embedded systems feature resource constraints, single-tasking focus, low power consumption, and high reliability for years of operation.
Multimedia systems handle continuous audio/video streams with high throughput and deadline-aware scheduling like EDF algorithms.
Mobile systems like Android and iOS balance touch interfaces, limited resources, power management, and always-on connectivity.
g.text: Operating systems for PDAs, smartphones, and tablets.
Touch-optimized with sophisticated power management and connectivity.

g.data-narration: Comparing general and special-purpose OS reveals trade-offs between flexibility and efficiency across hardware, scheduling, and kernel size.
Key takeaways: special-purpose systems prioritize dependability and efficiency, with real-time systems distinguishing hard versus soft deadlines.
These systems power IoT, robotics, automotive, and consumer electronics - foundational knowledge for modern software careers.
g.text: IoT • Robotics • Automotive Software • Smart Home • Consumer Electronics
Foundation for careers in embedded systems and IoT development
